articles.title_en: Drone debris sparks fire at Russian oil refinery, prompting evacuation of nearby residents
articles.lead_en: Drone debris struck an oil refinery in Tuapse in the early hours of April 28, setting it on fire, the operational headquarters of Krasnodar Krai reported.
articles.title_raw: Drone debris sparks fire at Russian oil refinery, prompting evacuation of nearby residents
articles.lead_raw: Drone debris struck an oil refinery in Tuapse in the early hours of April 28, setting it on fire, the operational headquarters of Krasnodar Krai reported.
